chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.placeholder: Describe what you want to build or fix...
chat.templateBanner: A template was just loaded — your previous project files were replaced.
chat.createScratch: Create from scratch instead of using this template (20-30 min)
chat.fixerHint: This can take up to 10 minutes — feel free to leave the page open, but do not close this page.
chat.rawFilesEmpty: No files yet in this session.

feedback.titleFix: Thanks for using the AI assistant!
feedback.thankYou: Your feedback is incredibly valuable and directly helps us improve the product for everyone. We really appreciate you taking a moment to share your experience!
feedback.notesLabel: Anything broken or could be better?
feedback.notesPlaceholder: What worked? What's off? What would you change?
feedback.restoreNote: Don't want to keep this build? You can restore your project to how it was before.
feedback.restoreButton: Restore project to before this build
feedback.dismissTooltip: Dismiss this feedback form. It won't come back for this change.

signup.createGame: To build a game from scratch instead of using this template, I need you to sign up first.
signup.fixGame: To run a fix on your game, I need you to sign up first.
signup.budget: You've used up your free anonymous budget — sign up to keep going.
signup.default: I need you to sign up first.

toolbar.shareLink: Share this link to invite players:
toolbar.previewClientTooltip: Open another window of this project to test multiplayer locally

settings.cloudSynced: This project syncs to parallaxpro.ai on every save.
settings.cloudHint: Sync this project to parallaxpro.ai so you can pick up where you left off from any computer.

editor.connectionLost: Connection lost — editing disabled until reconnection
editor.reconnectFailed: Unable to reconnect. Please check your connection and refresh the page.
editor.disconnectRefresh: Connection lost. Please refresh the page to continue editing.

projectList.emptyDefault: No projects yet. Create your first game!
projectList.emptyCloud: No cloud projects yet. Publishing or promoting a project will put it here.
projectList.cloudSignIn: Sign in to parallaxpro.ai to access your cloud projects.
projectList.stopTooltip: Stop this build (the run is killed and the project unlocks)
projectList.anonBanner: You're browsing anonymously — your projects live only in this browser. Sign up (free) to save them across devices and unlock more features.
projectList.restartNotice: We may restart the servers at any time as we iterate and flush out issues — apologies for the bumps! Your projects are always saved, but a long-running AI build could be killed mid-way and you'll need to retry it.
projectList.generateHint: Describe your game idea and AI will build it for you.
projectList.generatePlaceholder: e.g. A 3D platformer with double-jump and coin collection...
projectList.templateHint: Start with a ready-made game template you can customize.
projectList.loginTooltip: Sign in to parallaxpro.ai so you can publish this project
